div1.entryFree: Verdure, freshness, life and vigour: their (your lips') v. still endure, to drive infection from the dangerous year, Ven. 507. the ivy which had hid my princely trunk and sucked my v. out on't, Tp. I, 2, 87. by love the young and tender wit is turned to folly, blasting in the bud, losing his v. even in the prime, Gent. I, 1, 49.
